problem: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown
hypothesis: If Bose-Einstein condensate at higher temperature is applied to universe, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
